title: Finn and the Wobbly Worms
synopsis: Finn discovers that his garden worms have escaped and are causing silly chaos around town. With the help of his friend Maya, he must catch the wiggly troublemakers before they cause too much mischief.

pages.text: Finn loved his pet worms. He kept them in a big jar with holes in the lid. Every morning, he would say hello to his wiggly friends.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, holding a large glass jar filled with pink cartoon worms. His eyes are huge and sparkling with joy as he grins widely. The worms have exaggerated smiling faces and are bouncing around inside the jar.
illustration.alt: Finn holding a jar of happy cartoon worms

pages.text: But one morning, Finn got a big surprise. The jar was empty! The lid was on the ground. Where were his worms?

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, staring at an empty jar with his mouth dropped open in shock. His eyes are comically huge and bulging. The jar lid is bouncing on the ground nearby, and there's a squiggly trail leading away from the jar.
illustration.alt: Finn shocked at his empty worm jar

pages.text: Finn looked everywhere. Under his bed. In his toy box. Behind the couch. No worms anywhere! Then he heard his mom scream from the kitchen.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, crawling under furniture with his bottom sticking up in the air. His expression is determined and slightly dizzy from searching. Toys and dust bunnies are flying around him in exaggerated cartoon fashion.
illustration.alt: Finn searching under furniture for his worms

pages.text: Finn ran to the kitchen. There was Mom, standing on a chair, pointing at the floor. Pink worms were dancing around her feet!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, running into the kitchen with his arms stretched out. His mom is balanced precariously on a wobbly chair with her arms flailing. Three pink cartoon worms are doing a conga line around the chair legs, wearing tiny party hats.
illustration.alt: Mom on chair with dancing worms below

pages.text: Finn scooped up the kitchen worms, but more were missing. He called his friend Maya. Maybe she could help him find the rest.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, talking on a bright yellow phone that's almost as big as his head. His free hand is cupping two pink worms that are peeking out between his fingers with innocent expressions.
illustration.alt: Finn on phone holding two worms

pages.text: Maya came over right away. She was great at finding lost things. Together, they followed a slimy trail out of Finn's house and down the street.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, walking alongside Maya (a girl with curly black hair). Both children are bent over like detectives, following a sparkly pink slime trail. Finn is pointing dramatically while Maya holds a magnifying glass that's comically oversized.
illustration.alt: Finn and Maya following a slime trail

pages.text: The trail led to Mrs. Peterson's flower garden. There were three worms having a mud party in her prize roses! They were covered in dirt and having a blast.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, and Maya peeking over a white picket fence. Three pink worms are doing belly flops into mud puddles among bright red roses. The worms have huge grins and are splashing mud everywhere in exaggerated arcs.
illustration.alt: Worms having a mud party in flower garden

pages.text: Two more worms were at the ice cream truck! They were sliding down the side like it was a playground slide. The ice cream man was laughing so hard he could barely hold his scooper.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, watching in amazement as two pink worms surf down a rainbow-colored ice cream truck. The worms have their tiny arms spread wide like surfers. The jolly ice cream vendor is doubled over with laughter, his hat falling off.
illustration.alt: Worms sliding down ice cream truck

pages.text: Finn and Maya gently gathered all the worms. But the worms looked sad to go back in the jar. They had been having so much fun exploring!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, holding several pink worms in his cupped hands. The worms have exaggerated pouty faces with big sad eyes and drooping postures. Maya is patting one worm gently with her finger, looking sympathetic.
illustration.alt: Finn and Maya with sad-looking worms

pages.text: Finn had an idea! Instead of the jar, he would make them a big worm playground in his backyard. They could explore safely and still be his pets.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, with a huge lightbulb glowing above his head. His eyes are wide with excitement and his finger is pointed up in the classic 'eureka' pose. The lightbulb is cartoonishly large and sparkling with electricity bolts.
illustration.alt: Finn having a bright idea with lightbulb overhead

pages.text: Maya helped Finn build the best worm playground ever. It had tunnels, slides, and even a tiny swimming pool. The worms were so happy they did little wiggle dances.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, and Maya admiring an elaborate miniature playground. The pink worms are using tiny slides, popping out of colorful tunnels, and doing synchronized swimming in a bottle cap pool. Everyone has huge smiles and the worms are doing jazz hands.
illustration.alt: Worms playing in their new playground

pages.text: From that day on, Finn's worms were the happiest pets in town. And Finn learned that sometimes the best adventures happen when you let your friends be free to explore.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, and Maya sitting cross-legged next to the worm playground, watching their pink worm friends play. The sun is setting behind them in brilliant orange and purple stripes. All the worms are waving goodbye to the viewers with contented expressions.
illustration.alt: Finn and Maya watching happy worms at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: Where did Finn keep his pet worms at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Finn kept his pet worms in a big jar with holes in the lid.

questions.question: Who helped Finn look for his escaped worms?
questions.explanation: Maya was Finn's friend who came over to help him find the missing worms.

questions.question: Where were some of the worms having a mud party?
questions.explanation: Three worms were having a mud party in Mrs. Peterson's prize roses.

questions.question: What did the worms do at the ice cream truck?
questions.explanation: Two worms were sliding down the side of the ice cream truck like it was a playground slide.

questions.question: What did Finn build for his worms at the end?
questions.explanation: Finn built a worm playground in his backyard with tunnels, slides, and a tiny swimming pool.

pages.text: Finn loved his pet _____. He kept them in a big _____ with holes in the lid.
Maya came over to _____. Together, they followed a slimy _____ down the street.
Finn built the best worm _____ ever. The worms were so _____ they did little wiggle dances.
